concerns.text: Tasks T036-T039 implement a Shapiro-Wilk → ANOVA/Kruskal-Wallis decision tree with Dunn's/Bonferroni corrections. This semantically violates FR-005 which mandates a Levene's test → ANOVA/Welch's/Welch-James tree with Tukey/Games-Howell corrections. The task deliverable falls short of the statistical validity required by the spec.

Tasks T021a-b only implement a qualitative rubric for documentation quality (Setup/API/Arch sections). FR-009 explicitly requires 'Quantitative matching of repositories across conditions based on Lines of Code (LOC) and Cyclomatic Complexity (CC) with a tolerance of ±15%'. The task omits this mandatory constraint.

Task T028 specifies a generic 'llama-cpp-python' fallback. FR-008 mandates the fallback model MUST be 'phi-2 (quantized int4)' pinned to a specific HuggingFace commit hash. The task relaxes the specific model identity and reproducibility constraint.

Task T018 sets the 'Stop-Loss' intervention timeout to 60 minutes. The spec's Edge Case section explicitly defines a 45-minute timeout threshold for failed tasks. This is a direct relaxation of the defined constraint.

Tasks T044a/T045a verify resource usage via separate post-execution scripts. FR-010 requires 'active monitoring of execution time and memory usage... to verify constraints' during the pipeline execution. The task shifts from active instrumentation to passive post-hoc verification, violating the constraint.

Task T016 only logs clarification questions. SC-002 requires measuring the reduction in 'cognitive load' via a 'Cognitive Load Proxy' composite score (mentioned in Plan). The task fails to implement the derived metric required by the success criteria.
